# Lucky Verma

Machine Learning Engineer focused on applied ML research, production AI systems, transformer behavior, model monitoring, document intelligence, RAG, and knowledge graphs.

## Pages

- Home: https://luckyverma.com/
- Publications: https://luckyverma.com/publications/
- Projects: https://luckyverma.com/projects/
- CV: https://luckyverma.com/cv/
- Resume PDF: https://luckyverma.com/Lucky_Verma_Resume.pdf

## Public Research

- When Top-1 Fails: Calibrating LoRA Monitors for Masked Diffusion LMs: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24119
- When Does Removing LayerNorm Help? Activation Bounding as a Regime-Dependent Implicit Regularizer: https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.23434

## Public Code

- GitHub profile: https://github.com/lucky-verma
- Dynamic Tanh composition study: https://github.com/lucky-verma/dyt-composition-study

- MWB Linux: https://github.com/lucky-verma/mwb-linux
- Mail Reclaim: https://github.com/lucky-verma/mail-reclaim

## Notes

This site intentionally describes public artifacts and broadly describable work. It avoids private employer details and unsupported recognition or reviewing claims.
